Location

Where the Top 100 are based

Each researcher in the Top 100 is grouped by the country of their current institution. Choose a region to see its listing.

35 of the Top 100 researchers based here.

Maintained by Steve Hubbard (admin@wwirh.org). Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open, Mathematics Genealogy Project.
